Event: Summer Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR415
Magic Inside Outfit

The unit's spell power is increased by 30% for the duration of the battle.

When the unit uses the ability of a weapon, an amulet, a ring, or an artifact, acid balls are fired at 3 enemy units with the lowest current health. The targets receive pure damage equal to 80% of the unit's spell power, and become covered in acid. These enemy units receive 813000 magic damage for 5 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 25% per second for 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 75%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec. The armor's wearer also restores 55% health to self. The ability triggers at most once every 8 sec.

Once in a while, the unit increases all stats to self and 2 random allied units by 35% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
